---
title: "Final_Project695"
output: html_document
date: "2025-12-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(broom)
library(glmnet)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)


```


```{r}


# Load & clean factors 

ff5_raw <- read_csv(
  "data_raw/F-F_Research_Data_5_Factors_2x3_CSV/F-F_Research_Data_5_Factors_2x3.csv",
  skip = 3,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

ff5 <- ff5_raw %>%
  rename(ym = `...1`) %>%                  # YYYYMM code
  mutate(ym = as.character(ym)) %>%
  filter(str_detect(ym, "^[0-9]{6}$")) %>% # keep only data rows
  mutate(
    year  = as.integer(substr(ym, 1, 4)),
    month = as.integer(substr(ym, 5, 6)),
    date  = make_date(year, month, 1)
  ) %>%
  select(
    date,
    `Mkt-RF`, SMB, HML, RMW, CMA, RF
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(`Mkt-RF`, SMB, HML, RMW, CMA, RF), ~ as.numeric(.x) / 100)
  ) %>%
  rename(Mkt_RF = `Mkt-RF`)     


# Load & clean 25 portfolios#


ff25_raw <- read_csv(
  "data_raw/25_Portfolios_5x5_CSV/25_Portfolios_5x5.csv",
  skip = 15,                 
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

ff25_tmp <- ff25_raw %>%
  rename(ym = `...1`) %>%
  mutate(ym = as.character(ym)) %>%
  filter(str_detect(ym, "^[0-9]{6}$")) %>%
  mutate(
    year  = as.integer(substr(ym, 1, 4)),
    month = as.integer(substr(ym, 5, 6)),
    date  = make_date(year, month, 1)
  )

portfolio_cols <- setdiff(names(ff25_tmp), c("ym", "year", "month", "date"))

ff25 <- ff25_tmp %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(portfolio_cols),
      ~ {
        x <- as.numeric(.x)
        x[x %in% c(-99.99, -999)] <- NA_real_
        x / 100                  # percent -> decimal
      }
    )
  )


# Merge & make excess rets #


data_merged <- ff25 %>%
  inner_join(ff5, by = "date")

data_excess <- data_merged %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(portfolio_cols),
      ~ .x - RF,
      .names = "{.col}_excess"
    )
  )

excess_cols <- paste0(portfolio_cols, "_excess")

data_model_wide <- data_excess %>%
  select(
    date,
    all_of(excess_cols),
    Mkt_RF, SMB, HML, RMW, CMA, RF
  )


# Long format + next-month target     

data_model_long <- data_model_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(excess_cols),
    names_to = "portfolio",
    values_to = "excess_return"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    portfolio = str_remove(portfolio, "_excess")
  ) %>%
  group_by(portfolio) %>%
  arrange(date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    excess_return_next = lead(excess_return)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  drop_na(excess_return_next)


saveRDS(data_model_wide, "data_clean/data_model_wide.rds")
saveRDS(data_model_long, "data_clean/data_model_long.rds")

```

```{r}
# unique months in order
all_dates <- sort(unique(data_model_long$date))
n_dates   <- length(all_dates)

cut_idx   <- floor(0.8 * n_dates)
cut_date  <- all_dates[cut_idx]
cut_date
# this is the last month in the training period

train <- data_model_long %>% filter(date <= cut_date)
test  <- data_model_long %>% filter(date > cut_date)

length(unique(train$date))
length(unique(test$date))

```
```{r}
portfolio_focus <- "SMALL LoBM" 

train_one <- train %>% filter(portfolio == portfolio_focus)
test_one  <- test  %>% filter(portfolio == portfolio_focus)

# baseline OLS: predict next month excess return from factors
ols_one <- lm(
  excess_return_next ~ Mkt_RF + SMB + HML + RMW + CMA,
  data = train_one
)

summary(ols_one)

```

```{r}
# predictions and RMSE on test
test_one <- test_one %>%
  mutate(
    pred_ols = predict(ols_one, newdata = test_one),
    sq_err   = (excess_return_next - pred_ols)^2
  )

rmse_ols_one <- sqrt(mean(test_one$sq_err, na.rm = TRUE))
rmse_ols_one

```
```{r}
# OLS per portfolio on training data
ols_all <- train %>%
  group_by(portfolio) %>%
  do(
    tidy(
      lm(excess_return_next ~ Mkt_RF + SMB + HML + RMW + CMA, data = .)
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)")

# number of tests = portfolios * factors
n_tests <- nrow(ols_all)
n_tests

ols_all <- ols_all %>%
  mutate(
    p_bonf = p.adjust(p.value, method = "bonferroni"),
    p_fdr  = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")
  )

# Inspect how often each factor is significant
sig_summary <- ols_all %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sig_raw  = sum(p.value < 0.05),
    n_sig_bonf = sum(p_bonf < 0.05),
    n_sig_fdr  = sum(p_fdr < 0.05),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sig_summary

```

```{r}
ols_all %>%
  filter(term == "HML", p_fdr < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p_fdr) %>%
  select(portfolio, estimate, p.value, p_fdr) %>%
  head(10)

```

```{r}
# predictors and response for train / test
X_train <- train %>%
  select(Mkt_RF, SMB, HML, RMW, CMA)

y_train <- train$excess_return_next

X_test <- test %>%
  select(Mkt_RF, SMB, HML, RMW, CMA)

y_test <- test$excess_return_next

# glmnet needs matrices
X_train_mat <- as.matrix(X_train)
X_test_mat  <- as.matrix(X_test)

```

```{r}
ols_pooled <- lm(
  excess_return_next ~ Mkt_RF + SMB + HML + RMW + CMA,
  data = train
)

# test predictions
test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    pred_ols_pooled = predict(ols_pooled, newdata = test)
  )

rmse_ols_pooled <- test %>%
  summarise(
    rmse = sqrt(mean((excess_return_next - pred_ols_pooled)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  pull(rmse)

rmse_ols_pooled

```
```{r}
ols_pooled <- lm(
  excess_return_next ~ Mkt_RF + SMB + HML + RMW + CMA,
  data = train
)

# test predictions
test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    pred_ols_pooled = predict(ols_pooled, newdata = test)
  )

rmse_ols_pooled <- test %>%
  summarise(
    rmse = sqrt(mean((excess_return_next - pred_ols_pooled)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  pull(rmse)

rmse_ols_pooled

```
```{r}
set.seed(695)

cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(
  x = X_train_mat,
  y = y_train,
  alpha = 1,      # 1 = LASSO
  nfolds = 10
)

plot(cv_lasso)

lambda_min  <- cv_lasso$lambda.min   # lambda that minimizes CV error
lambda_1se  <- cv_lasso$lambda.1se   # more regularized, sparser

lambda_min
lambda_1se

# Fit final LASSO model at lambda.1se
lasso_fit <- glmnet(
  x = X_train_mat,
  y = y_train,
  alpha = 1,
  lambda = lambda_1se
)

coef(lasso_fit)

```

```{r}
test$pred_lasso <- as.numeric(predict(lasso_fit, newx = X_test_mat))

rmse_lasso <- test %>%
  summarise(
    rmse = sqrt(mean((excess_return_next - pred_lasso)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  pull(rmse)

rmse_lasso

```
```{r}
focus_portfolios <- c("SMALL LoBM", "BIG HiBM")

train %>%
  filter(portfolio %in% focus_portfolios) %>%
  group_by(portfolio) %>%
  summarise(
    n          = n(),
    min_next   = min(excess_return_next, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1_next    = quantile(excess_return_next, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_next= median(excess_return_next, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_next  = mean(excess_return_next, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3_next    = quantile(excess_return_next, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_next   = max(excess_return_next, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

```

```{r}
focus_portfolios <- c("SMALL LoBM", "BIG HiBM")

fig_ts_zoom <- data_model_long %>%
  filter(portfolio %in% focus_portfolios) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = excess_return_next)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = cut_date, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ portfolio, ncol = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.5, 0.5)) +   # zoom to -50% to +50%
  labs(
    title = "Next-Month Excess Returns Over Time (Zoomed)",
    subtitle = "Dashed line = train/test split; y-axis trimmed for clarity",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Next-month excess return"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

fig_ts_zoom

```

```{r}
focus_portfolios <- c("SMALL LoBM", "BIG HiBM")


train %>%
  filter(portfolio %in% focus_portfolios) %>%
  group_by(portfolio) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    share_negative = mean(excess_return_next < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_next = min(excess_return_next, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_next = max(excess_return_next, na.rm = TRUE)
  )


fig_ts_trim <- data_model_long %>%
  filter(
    portfolio %in% focus_portfolios,
    excess_return_next > -0.2,     
    excess_return_next <  0.2       
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = excess_return_next)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = cut_date, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ portfolio, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Next-Month Excess Returns (Trimmed to ±20%)",
    subtitle = "Dashed line = train/test split; extreme months removed for clarity",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Next-month excess return"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

fig_ts_trim
ggsave("fig_ts_trim_excess_returns.png", fig_ts_trim, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```


```{r}
portfolio_focus <- "SMALL LoBM"

scatter_df <- train %>%
  filter(portfolio == portfolio_focus) %>%
  select(excess_return_next, Mkt_RF, SMB, HML, RMW, CMA) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Mkt_RF, SMB, HML, RMW, CMA),
    names_to = "factor",
    values_to = "factor_value"
  )

fig_scatter <- scatter_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor_value, y = excess_return_next)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ factor, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = paste("Next-Month Excess Return vs Factors for", portfolio_focus),
    x = "Factor value (current month)",
    y = "Next-month excess return"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

fig_scatter

ggsave(
  "output/fig_scatter_small_lobm.png",
  fig_scatter,
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)


```

```{r}


sig_long <- sig_summary %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(n_sig_raw, n_sig_bonf, n_sig_fdr),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "count"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    method = dplyr::recode(
      method,
      n_sig_raw  = "Unadjusted (p < 0.05)",
      n_sig_bonf = "Bonferroni-adjusted",
      n_sig_fdr  = "FDR-adjusted"
    )
  )

fig_multi <- sig_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = term, y = count, fill = method)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Significant Factor Loadings Across 25 Portfolios",
    x = "Factor",
    y = "Count of significant coefficients",
    fill = "Significance rule"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

fig_multi

ggsave(
  "output/fig_multi_testing_counts.png",
  fig_multi,
  width = 7,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

```



```{r}


fig_coef <- ols_all %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = term, y = estimate)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Factor Loadings Across Portfolios",
    x = "Factor",
    y = "Estimated coefficient"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

fig_coef

ggsave(
  "output/fig_coef_boxplot.png",
  fig_coef,
  width = 7,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

```
